mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in housing units starts above 1.1 million signals a strengthening demand for residential construction, which compresses interest rates and boosts equity prices, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with HOUST > 1100000 are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the unemployment rate below 4.5% signals a tightening labor market that compresses wage growth and boosts corporate profitability, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods with UNRATE < 0.045 are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in industrial production above 104.5 signals a strengthening supply chain that boosts corporate profitability and compresses interest rates, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with INDPRO > 104.5 are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in real GDP above 16500 signals a strengthening demand for goods and services, which boosts corporate profitability and compresses interest rates, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods with GDPC1 > 16500 are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the federal funds rate above 2.5% signals a tightening monetary cycle that compresses equity prices and boosts interest rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in periods with FEDFUNDS > 0.025 are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in real GDP above 16500 and a 3-month increase in housing units starts above 1.1 million signals a strengthening demand for goods and services and residential construction, which boosts corporate profitability and compresses interest rates, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with GDPC1 > 16500 and HOUST > 1100000 are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in industrial production above 104.5 and a 3-month increase in real GDP above 16500 signals a strengthening supply chain and demand for goods and services, which boosts corporate profitability and compresses interest rates, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods with INDPRO > 104.5 and GDPC1 > 16500 are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
